channel.title: Pattern Recognition on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Pattern Recognition on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001): AI-assisted Security
item.category: "CompTIA SecAI+ Course" , "AI-assisted Security" , "Security Automation" , "Threat Detection" , "Deepfakes" , "Offensive AI" , "AI Security" , "CY0-001" , "SOAR" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master AI-assisted security for the CompTIA SecAI+ CY0-001 exam. Learn AI-enabled security tools, defensive use cases, security automation, CI/CD integration, and how attackers weaponize AI for deepfakes, social engineering, and automated attack generation.

item.title: The Impact of Machine Learning on Cybersecurity
item.category: "Machine Learning" , "Cybersecurity" , "Adaptation" , "Artificial Intelligence" , "Threat Detection" , "Data Protection" , "Real-time" , "Supervised Learning" , "Unsupervised Learning" , "Reinforcement Learning" , "False Positives" , "False Negatives" , "Employee Training" , "Security Solutions" , "Data Analytics" , "Network Security" , "Cloud Security" , "Pattern Recognition" , "Anomaly Detection" , "Cyber Threats"
item.description: Discover the impact of machine learning on cybersecurity and how to adapt.
